name: Scottish Power PLC
description: ScottishPower is a major vertically integrated energy company based in Glasgow, Scotland, and is a subsidiary of the Spanish utility firm Iberdrola. The company focuses on regulated network distribution, transmission, and low-carbon energy generation, including significant investments in onshore and offshore wind power. In addition to its generation and network operations, ScottishPower serves as a prominent supplier of electricity and gas to millions of homes and businesses across the United Kingdom, committed to driving the transition toward a cleaner, greener energy future.
